Description
neqsim.process.safety.settleout
 
  • Classes in neqsim.process.safety.settleout used by neqsim.process.safety.settleout
    Class
    Description
    SettleOutPressureAnalyzer
    Compressor settle-out (and general gas-volume equalisation) pressure screening.
    SettleOutPressureAnalyzer.Compartment
    Mutable working record for one connected gas volume.
    SettleOutPressureAnalyzer.SettleOutVerdict
    Verdict of a settle-out pressure screening.
    SettleOutPressureResult
    Result of a SettleOutPressureAnalyzer settle-out (gas-volume equalisation) screening.
    SettleOutPressureResult.CompartmentResult
    Inventory contribution of a single connected gas volume.
